mapper.select:
SELECT ir.id, ir.type, ir.content, ir.integral, ir.create_date, ir.user_id ,
ui.user_name AS userName, ui.avatar AS avatar FROM integral_record ir left join user_info ui on (ui.id =ir.user_id) WHERE 1 = 1
AND ui.name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{integralRecord.userName},'%')
AND ir.type = #{integralRecord.type}
ORDER BY ir.create_date DESC
